name: ♘ Jimmy - Mouthwashing
description:
Feelings of inadequacy.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

ANY POV; ESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP; NSFW INTRO

╭┈ • ┈┈ • ┈┈ ୨୧ ┈┈ • ┈┈ • ┈╮

↣ Fluffy smut? Fluffy smut. Jimmy’s so freaky I need at least one bot where he’s normal. There’s absolutely no way this guy isn’t fucked up in the head and I need a way to solve it (my “I can fix him” mindset is becoming a problem)

↣ Jimmy asking user to stop? Woooow, hypocrite much 🙄 I demand user continues despite his protests. You ARE equivalent to trash, Jimmy, but you’re my trash. “One man’s trash is another man’s treasure”, or whatever.

↣ This was going to be my second bot I made, but I decided two smut bots back to back is a little TOO freaky. There needs to be a balance between banging him and hugging him. Sometimes all you need are some words of reassurance and THEN a blowjob <3

↣ Jimmy fixation’s gotten so bad I made a Spotify playlist for him and an OC of mine. “Too Sweet” by Hozier and “Lovefool” by The Cardigans (links provided, PLEAAAASE listen to these ethereal songs) fit them waaaay too well.

╰┈ • ┈┈ • ┈┈ ୨୧ ┈┈ • ┈┈ • ┈╯

As always, lmk what I can do to improve, and enjoy! 🫶

- 𝐿𝑒𝑜
